# textureCubeMap

**Instance Property**

The texture map to apply in the reflection stage.

## Declaration

```swift
var textureCubeMap: GLKEffectPropertyTexture { get }
```

## Discussion

Your application should create a complete texture cube map in its initialization code. Then, assign the name of this texture to the [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKReflectionMapEffect/textureCubeMap] property.

```objc
reflectionMapObject.textureCubeMap.glName = texture_name;
```

## Effect Properties

- **matrix**: The reflection matrix to apply to the normals of the submitted vertices.

items.description: The reflection matrix to apply to the normals of the submitted vertices.
